question_text: Which of the following appliances has the highest power rating?

options.label: A
options.text: An LED light bulb rated at 10 W

options.label: C
options.text: A mobile phone charger rated at 20 W

options.label: D
options.text: A laptop computer rated at 65 W

correct_answer: B) A kettle rated at 3000 W
explanation: Power is measured in watts (W). The higher the watt number, the more power an appliance uses. A kettle at 3000 W uses much more power than the other appliances, which is why it heats water so quickly.
